questions.q: According to a new UCSF study highlighted in early May 2026, what surprising side effect has been linked to GLP-1 weight loss drugs during periods of rapid weight loss?
In early May 2026, the FDA approved expanded access to daraxonrasib, a promising but unapproved drug used to treat what specific type of cancer?
On April 30, 2026, President Trump pulled the stalled surgeon general nomination of Casey Means and announced which medical professional and Fox News contributor as his new pick?
A health report from May 2, 2026, highlighted that which liver condition is currently on the rise globally, largely driven by increasing rates of obesity and metabolic disorders?
In a move reported in late April and early May 2026, the U.S. FDA proposed excluding active ingredients for which class of popular drugs from the list used by compounding pharmacies?
